title: Toon's Partner Pokemon [Cobblemon]
description: An Cobblemon Addon that adds Unique Partner Pokemon in the same style/vibe of Pokemon Ranger's Ukelele Pichu
body:
**READ BEFORE PLAYING!!!!!!!!!!!!**
These Pokemon do NOT appear in the wild, they are meant to be unique so in order to obtain them you must add the custom starter config file to your instances config folder.

1. Open the addon .zip.
2. look for the folder that says "starter options"
3. copy the config file in the "regular" folder if you just want the base forms. Copy the file in the "regular + shiny" folder if you want to have access to the shinies or want to give your server access to the shinies.
4. paste that into the cobblemon folder inside of the config folder as seen below.![config folder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f42567ac74b9a2fda23d84f1a00d80aedeb9e81.png)![cobblemon folder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77367c318810f6ce3632080ccaa74eb45b20f293.png)
5. load up a world with the datapack in it and test the starters. If it still doesnt work, follow the steps again carefully.

Currently has 5 unique partner pokemon to bring with you on your journey, all of which have shoulder animations so you never have to put them in a ball!
